description_long: This object depicts a stylized cluster of two white-petaled flowers with orange centers, emerging from a dense base of green, spiky foliage. The flowers are flat and cartoon-like, with each bloom featuring five rounded petals radiating from a circular center. The foliage is rendered as a series of jagged, overlapping green shapes, giving the impression of thick, grass-like leaves. The flowers are positioned at different heights, suggesting a natural, slightly asymmetrical arrangement. The entire structure appears to be made from a thin, rigid material, as evidenced by the extremely narrow side profile. The colors are bold and simple, with no visible texture or shading, contributing to a playful, graphic appearance suitable for parks, playgrounds, or decorative urban planters.
description: A stylized pair of white flowers with orange centers and jagged green foliage, rendered in a flat, cartoon-like style. The object is thin and rigid, with bold, simple colors and a playful appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing two white flowers with orange centers emerging from dense, jagged green foliage.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the extreme thinness of the object, with only the edges of the flowers and foliage visible.
description_view_2: Rear angled view similar to the front, but with the flowers and foliage mirrored and slightly less prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the object's thin profile and edge details.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged radially around the orange center, with each flower displaying five distinct, non-overlapping petals in a simple, symmetrical pattern.
